input.tenant_message: Fridge and stove hooked up to this adapter and extension cord. Landlord refuses to change receptacle and says this is ok. 2 to 3 prong adapter ran extension cord that sits on the floor in between my oven and stove. Is it safe though?

ai_output.recommended_action: This is a serious fire hazard and likely an electrical code violation. Major appliances (refrigerator, stove) must not be connected via adapters or extension cords — they require dedicated grounded outlets. Dispatch licensed electrician to install proper 3-prong grounded receptacles. Advise tenant to unplug extension cord setup immediately. Report to building inspector if landlord refuses.

source.post_title: Fridge and stove hooked up to this adapter and extension cord. landlord refuses to change receptacle and says this is ok…is it safe tho ?
